name: Hanford & Trentham
description:
Hanford & Trentham are both suburbs of Stoke-on-Trent and are serviced by the A500 and A34.

Both areas feature residential housing and a selection of shops. Hanford Park is in the heart of Hanford.

Trentham Gardens has become one of the region’s major leisure and tourist attraction after a costly regeneration project which includes landscaped gardens, a monkey sanctuary and a aerial adventure park.
